_comment: ClaudeTeam-essential scopes only. Feishu's UI 'Batch import/export scopes' has a silent partial-success bug — Monaco editor rejects every programmatic-input mechanism (synthetic ClipboardEvent / keyboard.type / OS clipboard + Cmd+V) so the Add click only commits the FEW scopes that happen to already be in the bot's auth state. 2026-05-08 forensic confirmed bot ends up with ~3 scopes regardless of how many are in this file. Shipping a short realistic list: those that go through OR that the operator can quickly grant by hand. For OpenAPI features needing extra scopes (auto-chat-create needs im:chat:create), grant them by visiting https://open.feishu.cn/app/<app_id>/auth and clicking + in the UI.
